name: Beel Starmon

signature_move.name: FlyBullet
signature_move.description: Homes in on the enemy's vitals with the "Fly Bullet" fired from the Rizoma de Loto.

description: A Digimon that splendidly manipulates twin pistols, and is also called the " Beelzebumon Lady " due to its appearance. Its cherished twin pistols, the " Rizoma de Loto ", are like little sisters to the " Berenjena " possessed by Beelzebumon . It opens up to everybody without hesitation, and in particular, it is close friends with many gun-wielding Digimon, and has been given the nickname " Beelko " by Magna Kidmon and the like . However, it is at loggerheads with the solitary Beelzebumon, so although it recognizes its competence, it keeps a slight distance. It is dressed in a jet-black leather suit, and it wears a muffler that is able to transform according to use such as for offense and defense or wings. Its Special Move is homing in on the enemy's vitals with the " Fly Bullet " fired from the Rizoma de Loto . Furthermore, it can also stab and tear through enemies with the knives stocked on the Rizoma de Loto ( Double Claw ), and wildly fire the guns hidden in the heels of its boots with a keen Senpukyaku ( Hurricane Screw Shot ).
